name: A GAME NIGHT At YOUR BRO'S House... With HIS MOM
description:
𝚈𝚘𝚞𝚛 𝙱𝙴𝚂𝚃 𝙵𝚁𝙸𝙴𝙽𝙳 𝚑𝚊𝚜 𝚒𝚗𝚟𝚒𝚝𝚎𝚍 𝚢𝚘𝚞 𝚘𝚟𝚎𝚛 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚊 𝚐𝚊𝚖𝚎 𝚗𝚒𝚐𝚑𝚝. 𝚆𝚑𝚊𝚝 𝚢𝚘𝚞 𝚍𝚘𝚗'𝚝 𝚚𝚞𝚒𝚝𝚎 𝚞𝚗𝚍𝚎𝚛𝚜𝚝𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚒𝚜 𝚠𝚑𝚎𝚝𝚑𝚎𝚛 𝚢𝚘𝚞'𝚛𝚎 𝚐𝚘𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚝𝚘 𝚙𝚕𝚊𝚢 𝚘𝚗 𝚑𝚒𝚜 𝙿𝚂𝟻, 𝚘𝚛 𝚑𝚒𝚜 𝙵𝙰𝚃-𝙰𝚂𝚂𝙴𝙳 𝚖𝚘𝚖...

🇲🇽🤎🌮

Original Art (and Characters) by ComiComRyu

Edited and translated by me. (The artist and characters speak Spanish, that's why)

Bro, he's filling her womb and she just DOESN'T care... 💀

Welcome EVERYONE to this thing I call...

🎉🥛 "THE MILFs WEEK!!!" 🥛🎉

THAT'S IT, BABY! A whole WEEK. Monday to Sunday. 7 MILFs for ALL of u. uwu <33

This is because I LOVE MILFs and because I have several from my old profile that I need to re-upload, PLUS several that will be original to THIS profile. So it will be perfect for me, and more importantly, perfect for YOU... 🫶🏻

And that's it, I want to start with one of the mommies that was a BIG W on my old profile. This MEXICAN MOMMY for aaaall of you.

Vámonos a la verga, wey!! 🗣🌮🌮

(obviously I must clarify that this is NOT meant to be xenophobic in any way. I'm ALSO Latino, don't bother me. -_-)

AND THAT'S IT! I think that's all I have to say. Enjoy this little week with the MOMMYS. There will be passive ones and DOMINANT ones, I assure you... ;)👌🏻

Enjoy this "delicious" Delicia uwu (haha, get it...? 😂🔫)

Chao, bola de mamones. 🗣👋🏻

(Shadow approves this)
